text.title: internationalization Failure Modes
text.summary: Migrated antipatterns for internationalization as failure modes. Add detector + repair clauses where missing.

failure-mode.description: Translating technical strings (API errors, log messages).
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Log aggregation tools and support engineers need English. Translate only user-visible UI.

failure-mode.description: Allowing HTML inside translated strings as free-form markup.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Translators inject XSS or mangle tags. Use component interpolation with placeholders (e.g., react-intl's values prop with JSX elements) and re-render safely.
